title: How to push the due date based on the number of days in another column?
excerpt: I want to change the due date of a column once a new month hits. I want the due date to change by the number of days represented in a separate column.

posts.author: Jacobweber123 (Jacob Weber)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to change the due date of a column once a new month hits. I want the due date to change by the number of days represented in a separate column.
